name: driVe baR
address: Behind 1A, 3131 Smokey Point Dr Suite 1C, Arlington, WA 98223
about: driVe baR is a virtual golf and sports simulation venue in Arlington, WA. It offers simulator bays for golf and various sports, providing an all-weather environment with comfortable temperatures. The facility features a snack bar with refreshments, snacks, and alcoholic beverages. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, with options for private parties and special events. The venue is equipped with high-definition simulators designed for both practice and entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Full bar and snack service available

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks, chips, candy, and partnered local restaurants for full food service
Beer, seltzers, and other alcoholic beverages available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack bar with refreshments, snacks, and alcoholic beverages. External food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, driVe baR is family-friendly and suitable for kids.
